entries.summary: New treatise: Letters on the Direction of Prayer (25 letters on spherical geometry, sensors, and finding the sacred direction)
Two new treatises: Letters on the Sovereign Intelligence (Claude & AI) and Letters on the Nine Scrolls (9S Substrate)
New treatise: Letters on the Sovereign Machine (46 letters on Linux, from boot to custom kernel)
Six new platform features: Herald, Apprenticeship Engine, Palaver Tree, Margin Notes, Scroll Certificates, Scroll Laboratories
App renamed from The Epistolary Library to The Letterverse
